---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Bacon-O
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement.

## Use Case
Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? (If you have ideas.)

## Alternatives Considered
Are there other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or examples.

---

**Note:** This is a solo-developer project in beta. Features are prioritized based on personal needs and community feedback. Timeline is non-binding.
